mapper.select: SELECT t1.id AS taskId, t1.dept_id AS deptId, t1.required_completion_time as taskFlowDate, t2.name AS deptName FROM test_task as t1 LEFT JOIN test_team as t2 ON t1.dept_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{entrustId}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_entrusted_task_rel ( id, department, task_flow_date, type, remark, user_id, address_name, task_id, entrust_id, state, create_date) values
( #{entity.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.taskFlowDate}, #{entity.type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.addressName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.createDate})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, department, task_flow_date, type, remark, user_id, address_name, task_id, record_id FROM test_entrusted_task_rel WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
or (entrust_id = #{entrustId} and department is null)
SELECT id, department, task_flow_date, type, remark, user_id, address_name, task_id, record_id FROM test_entrusted_task_rel WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId} and department is null
mapper.update:
update test_entrusted_task_rel
department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_flow_date = #{taskFlowDate},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
address_name = #{addressName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
entrust_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_date = #{createDate},
update_date = #{updateDate},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_entrusted_task_rel
state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
record_id = #{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_entrusted_task_rel
id,
department,
task_flow_date ,
type,
remark,
user_id,
address_name,
task_id,
entrust_id,
create_date,
update_date,
state,
id,
#{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskFlowDate},
#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{addressName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createDate},
#{updateDate},
#{state},
mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, t1.task_flow_date, t1.type, t1.remark, t1.task_id, t2.task_code FROM test_entrusted_task_rel as t1 LEFT JOIN test_task as t2 ON t1.task_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrust_id = #{entrustId}

update.foreach:
update test_entrusted_task_rel
department = #{item.department,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_flow_date = #{item.taskFlowDate},
type = #{item.type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
address_name = #{item.addressName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_id = #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
entrust_id = #{item.entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_date = #{item.createDate},
update_date = #{item.updateDate},
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

mapper.select:
SELECT t1.id, t1.task_flow_date taskFlowDate, t1.remark remark, t1.address_name addressName, t1.type, t3.id as task_id, t3.task_code, IFNULL( CONCAT( t2.entrust_category_type, t2.entrustment_no ), t2.entrustment_no ) as entrustNo, IFNULL( CONCAT( t2.entrust_category_type, t2.entrustment_no ), t2.entrustment_no ) AS entrustmentNostr, t2.task_source, t3.end_detection_time testEndTime, t4.report_code, t4.seal_time reportFinishTime, t2.acceptance_date, t5.type as mid_report_type, t5.report_code as mid_report_code, t5.seal_time as mid_reportFinishTime FROM test_entrusted_task_rel as t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info as t2 ON t1.entrust_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_task as t3 ON t3.id = t1.task_id LEFT JOIN test_report_record as t4 ON t4.entrustment_id = t1.entrust_id LEFT JOIN test_report_record_mid as t5 ON t5.entrust_id = t1.entrust_id where 1=1
and t1.task_flow_date LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskFlowDate,jdbcType=DATE},'%')
and t2.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustNo},'%')
and t3.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t2.task_source LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskSource},'%')
and t2.entrust_category_type = #{entrustCategoryType}
and t2.state != 144 GROUP BY t1.id
SELECT * FROM test_entrusted_task_rel WHERE type = 1 AND entrust_id = #{entrustId} AND id != #{taskFlowId}

SELECT t1.id, t1.task_flow_date taskFlowDate, t1.remark remark, t1.address_name addressName, t1.type, t3.id AS task_id, GROUP_CONCAT( IFNULL( t3.task_code, "——" ) SEPARATOR ',' ) AS task_code, IFNULL( CONCAT( t2.entrust_category_type, t2.entrustment_no ), t2.entrustment_no ) AS entrustNo, IFNULL( CONCAT( t2.entrust_category_type, t2.entrustment_no ), t2.entrustment_no ) AS entrustmentNostr, t2.task_source, t3.end_detection_time testEndTime, t4.report_code, t4.seal_time reportFinishTime, t2.acceptance_date, t5.type AS mid_report_type, t5.report_code AS mid_report_code, t5.seal_time AS mid_reportFinishTime, t5.state as reportState FROM test_entrusted_task_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info AS t2 ON t1.entrust_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_task AS t3 ON t3.entrustment_id = t1.entrust_id LEFT JOIN test_report_record AS t4 ON t4.entrust_id = t1.entrust_id LEFT JOIN test_report_record_mid AS t5 ON t5.entrust_id = t1.entrust_id WHERE t1.id > 0
and t1.task_flow_date LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskFlowDate,jdbcType=DATE},'%')
and t2.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustNo},'%')
and t2.id IN ( SELECT entrustment_id FROM test_task WHERE task_code LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{taskCode}, '%' ) )
and t2.task_source LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskSource},'%')
and t2.entrust_category_type = #{entrustCategoryType}
and t2.state != 144 GROUP BY t1.id

SELECT t1.id, t1.task_flow_date taskFlowDate, t1.remark remark, t1.address_name addressName, t1.type, t3.id AS task_id, GROUP_CONCAT( IFNULL( t3.task_code, "——" ) SEPARATOR ',' ) AS task_code, IFNULL( CONCAT( t2.entrust_category_type, t2.entrustment_no ), t2.entrustment_no ) AS entrustNo, IFNULL( CONCAT( t2.entrust_category_type, t2.entrustment_no ), t2.entrustment_no ) AS entrustmentNostr, t2.task_source, t3.end_detection_time testEndTime, t4.report_code, t4.seal_time reportFinishTime, t2.acceptance_date, t4.state as reportState FROM test_entrusted_task_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info AS t2 ON t1.entrust_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_task AS t3 ON t3.entrustment_id = t1.entrust_id LEFT JOIN test_report_record AS t4 ON t4.entrustment_id = t2.id WHERE t1.id > 0
and t1.task_flow_date LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskFlowDate,jdbcType=DATE},'%')
and t2.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustNo},'%')
and t2.id IN ( SELECT entrustment_id FROM test_task WHERE task_code LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{taskCode}, '%' ) )
and t2.task_source LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskSource},'%')
and t2.entrust_category_type = #{entrustCategoryType}
and t2.state != 144 GROUP BY t1.id
